description: Forgememo persistent memory tools for AI agents

setup.description: First-time setup — requires the user to complete interactive provider selection
setup.note: Do not try to bypass first-run setup. The user must run 'forgemem init' in a real terminal and choose a provider interactively. After setup, tell the user to restart Codex to activate the MCP connection.

tools.name: get_memory_details
tools.description: Fetch full content for IDs returned by search_memories.

parameters.ids: list of IDs like d:42 or s:3

tools.name: get_memory_timeline
tools.description: Chronological context around a distilled summary.

tools.name: save_session_summary
tools.description: Write a structured session summary (daemon write path).
